node.statement: FIB-PF-BINARY-ISO-001: Relative to the Perron-Frobenius binary Fibonacci coefficients (per `summary.tex` §7.3.1 [[def:PF]]) x=1/D, y=φ/D, p=1/D, q=1/D, r=sqrt(φ)/D with D²=1+φ², the coordinate binary η matrix in the sourced orthogonal binary fusion-tree basis (left-associated per [P1.6(i)]) is an isometry. Lean (in `Formalisation/Fibonacci/Binary.lean`) packages the accepted scalar PF normalisations with the accepted binary coordinate isometry theorem to prove `PFBinaryEta^* PFBinaryEta = I`; Julia and WolframScript check the exact PF 5 × 2 matrix Gram product. This node proves only the coordinate-level PF binary map after the basis and coefficient conventions are fixed; it does not prove the general quantum-dimension amplitude formula, categorical PF naturality, string-net fixed-point semantics, or basis construction.
